Storable: determining recursion limit: 64999 passed, try more 64999 ...

--- lib/Storable/Limit.pm ---
test -d lib/Storable || mkdir lib/Storable
cp dist/Storable/lib/Storable/Limit.pm lib/Storable/Limit.pm
